sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24565" key="diabo/hsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαβό-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24565.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crying out</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">aloud,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.455b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
